summary: TWO_COLUMN Riesz representation: functional f(u)=∫_0^0.5 u dx represented by g(x)=1_[0, 0.5] ∈ L². LEFT axes with RED step g + BLUE test function u morphing via ValueTracker shape_tr + PURPLE shaded overlap region (= inner product domain). RIGHT live ⟨u, g⟩ computed via np.trapezoid matching f(u).
